app.title: honne.
app.footer: This app is a communication support tool that helps you put your feelings into words. If you need professional support, please consult a medical or counseling service.

steps.2: Step 2: Describe what's on your mind

step1.prompt: Choose the option that feels most like you right now. The follow-up questions will adapt to your choice.
step1.aiToggleDesc: (When on, a request is sent at the final step. When off, results appear instantly using only on-device data.)

自分軸.title: I want to think at my own pace
自分軸.description: You feel reassured when you understand the reasons. You prefer to be convinced before moving forward.

相手軸.title: I want to feel understood first
相手軸.description: You're deeply considerate of others. Feeling heard makes a big difference for you.

社会軸.title: I'm worried about impact on work or daily life
社会軸.description: Having a clear plan helps you act. You care about fulfilling your responsibilities.

step2.prompt: Write about something you can't say to someone, or feelings you're struggling to put into words. It's okay if it's messy.
step2.placeholder: e.g. I want to tell my boss I'm overloaded but can't bring myself to say it. There was something I wanted to ask my doctor but froze in the appointment. I can't find the words to thank my parents. I have frustrations with my partner but don't want to hurt them…
step2.offlineNotice: Offline mode is on. Your input won't be sent to any server — results are generated entirely on this device.

step6.slowNotice: This involves AI processing and may take up to a minute depending on your connection.

disclaimer.title: Important notice
disclaimer.body: What you see is a hypothesis to spark self-awareness — not a medical diagnosis or treatment recommendation. Please consult a healthcare professional for any health concerns.

step7.honneDisclaimer: The following is a hypothesis — "this might be true." If it doesn't resonate, trust your own feelings instead.
step7.feelingOff: If the result feels off, that awareness itself is valuable — you've recognized what doesn't fit you.
step7.legalNote: This app is a communication support tool based on personality statistics. It does not provide medical diagnoses or treatment advice. If you have health concerns, please see a qualified healthcare provider.

saveSection.title: 💬 Save this honne
saveSection.descPremium: With Premium, save and revisit unlimited entries.
saveSection.descFree: Free plan allows up to {limit} visible entries.

analysisDesc.noAi: Results are based on personality statistics (offline mode).
analysisDesc.aiDone: Analyzed in depth using personality statistics and AI.
analysisDesc.limitReached: Daily limit reached — showing personality-based result.
analysisDesc.aiFailed: AI generation failed — showing personality-based result.
analysisDesc.base: Results are based on personality statistics.

step7.limitError: You've reached today's limit ({limit} uses). Go unlimited with Premium.
step7.aiError: Failed to retrieve AI response. Please try again later.
step7.aiIncompleteError: The AI response was incomplete. Please try again later.
step7.notFound: No matching result found. Please start over.

payment.successDetail: Payment complete. All features are now unlimited.

onboarding.title: honne.
onboarding.tagline: What you want to say, but can't.
onboarding.description:
Boss, doctor, partner, family…
We help you put those unspoken feelings into words.

steps.title: Choose your type
steps.desc: Pick the one that feels most like you from 3 options

steps.title: Write your feelings
steps.desc: No need to be eloquent — just write what comes to mind

steps.title: Your true feelings emerge
steps.desc: Answer 3 questions and your honne becomes visible

onboarding.disclaimer:
This app helps you put feelings into words.
It does not provide medical diagnosis or professional counseling.

report.desc: AI analyzes your {count} saved entries comprehensively.
report.error: Failed to generate report. Please try again later.

empty.title: No records yet
empty.desc: Save a honne and it will appear here.
